signals.headline: Bitcoin surges past $74K to one-month high on April 14, 2026 | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Bitcoin surges past $74K to one-month high on April 14, 2026 | YES | HIGH confidence**  
Bitcoin broke key resistance at $74,000, reaching near $75,000 amid strong ETF inflows and institutional demand, confirmed as of April 14 at 8:30 a.m. ET with price at $74,314.61 (up $3,125 from prior day).[1][2]  
This price action could shift prediction markets on BTC bull trends or resistance breaks, though
